rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors. Clearly a header with no associated monetary values.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 'paid molineux Braziers Bill', 17 shillings, and 10 pence. claude-haiku misread the description and incorrectly placed '17' in pounds, '0' in shillings, and an empty pence column.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 'paid mr Combos Bill', 1 pound, 7 shillings, and 6 pence. claude-haiku misread the description and the monetary values, placing '10' in pounds and leaving shillings/pence empty.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 'Ladyday Corn Price', 1 shilling, and 0 pence. The pounds column is empty. claude-haiku misread the pence as '6' by incorrectly aligning with the subsequent row's amount.

rows.description: paid for Flooring of Room over of new Bursary
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts (10 shillings, 0 pence). The pounds column is empty. claude-haiku significantly misread the description and extracted incorrect amounts (7 shillings, 6 pence).

rows.description: paid mr Collins in full of his first Bill of Candles
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts (21 pounds, 10 shillings, 0 pence). claude-haiku significantly misread the description and missed the pounds value entirely.

rows.description: paid Do for lighting of Winter Lamps
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts (1 pound, 3 shillings, 0 pence). claude-haiku misread the description and the pounds value as '21'.

rows.description: paid Cook Acct Dinner & xmas Gaudies
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms that no monetary amounts are present for this row. gemini-flash correctly identified this. claude-haiku incorrectly extracted 1 pound and 4 shillings, likely due to misalignment.

rows.description: paid into ye Treasury Chest 200 Guineas
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts (210 pounds, 15 shillings, 4 pence). gemini-flash's note regarding the conversion of '200 Guineas' to '£210' adds significant contextual confidence. claude-haiku significantly misread the description and extracted incorrect amounts.

Visual verification confirms no monetary amounts are present for this row. gemini-flash correctly identified this. claude-haiku incorrectly extracted 1 shilling and 0 pence, likely due to misalignment with the next entry.

rows.description: paid mr Hornor for Battle Books, Ink & Paper
rows.notes: Amounts (1 shilling, 0 pence) are consistent across both extractors. Visual verification for the description confirms gemini-flash's 'Hornor' and 'Battle' over claude-haiku's 'Horner' and 'Bottle'. The pounds column is empty.

rows.description: paid the Cooks Bill for washing of Hall, Mops &c.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 'Mops' in the description and 4 pence. claude-haiku misread 'Mops' as 'money' and the pence as '6'.
Consensus across both extractors for amounts and description for this subtotal line.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'Ditto' and amounts (73 pounds, 19 shillings, 9 pence). claude-haiku misread the description as 'Deductio' and extracted incorrect pounds (23) and pence (2).

claude-haiku was disqualified by the Hard Rule Filter for `amount_pence_whole` (24, exceeding 11). Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 522 pounds, 10 shillings, 2 pence, and a 0.5 fraction (clearly visible 'ob' symbol after the '2'). The description column is empty for this row.

claude-haiku was disqualified by the Hard Rule Filter for `amount_pence_whole` (16, exceeding 11). Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 'Summa totalis solutorum' and amounts (874 pounds, 17 shillings, 10 pence).

rows.description: Ex Receptis que erant a Dno Anni præcedentis
rows.notes: claude-haiku was disqualified by the Hard Rule Filter for `amount_pence_whole` (16, exceeding 11) and also incorrectly identified the `row_type` as 'header'. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 1043 pounds, 1 shilling, 10 pence, and a 0.5 fraction ('ob' symbol). gemini-flash's description for 'Dno' is also more accurate.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'Deductis Solutis' and amounts. The amount matches the 'Summa totalis solutorum' (Row 16), which makes contextual sense. claude-haiku misread the pounds value as '824'.
Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts (168 pounds, 4 shillings, 9 pence). claude-haiku misread the shillings value as '9'.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and row type. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this header line with several subsequent individual approver names into one long description for this row, failing to segment the distinct entries.
